name: ip2whois
description: WHOIS domain MCP server that query the WHOIS information using IP2WHOIS API.
long_description: This is a simple Model Context Protocol (MCP) server implementation for IP2WHOIS API. It will return WHOIS information for a domain, including expiry dates, registrar information, and registrant data.

tools.name: get_whois
tools.description: Look up WHOIS data for a domain name.

ip2whoisapi_key.title: IP2WHOIS API Key
ip2whoisapi_key.description: Your IP2WHOIS API key for detailed WHOIS information.
